biz_name: Augusta Hair Braiding and Micro Locs

analytics.last_inbound_snippet: Can you call me about this ?

cause_analysis.narrative: Augusta Hair Braiding and Micro Locs churned on 2026-04-28 after 41 days with Zoca. Classification: reactive fade — Zoca reached out 80 times, but the client only replied 10. A one-sided monologue in the weeks before churn.
recommendations: [Engagement] One-way outreach is a warning, not a save. Cap outreach at 5 attempts if no reply, then switch to a different channel or a different messenger (SP → AM → team lead) to break the pattern.
